## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened instead.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Device model | <!-- e.g. AYN Thor Pro --> |
| Android version | <!-- e.g. Android 13 (API 33) --> |

| Single or dual display | <!-- single / dual --> |

## Additional context
